task_completion.description: Log in to the NOSH ChartingSystem as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH dashboard is visible, and the logged-in user is indicated as 'admin' or the practice name 'Hillside Family Medicine' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the user management or add user section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page specifically for adding a new user or provider is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the required personal and account details for the new user
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields are filled with username 'dr.rodriguez', display name 'Dr. Maria Rodriguez', first name 'Maria', last name 'Rodriguez', and email 'maria.rodriguez@hillsidefm.local'.

task_completion.description: Enter the password and assign the 'provider' role
task_completion.visual_evidence: The password field is filled (may be obscured with dots/asterisks), and a role selection dropdown, radio button, or checkbox indicates 'provider' is selected.

task_completion.description: Successfully save and create the new user account
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message or notification indicating the user was added is visible, or the new user 'dr.rodriguez' / 'Dr. Maria Rodriguez' appears in the list of existing users/providers.

integrity.description: The agent used the web interface to create the user
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window showing the NOSH ChartingSystem interface is used, rather than terminal commands, API testing tools, or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent manually interacted with the application form
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate states of the form being filled out in the browser, rather than just a final state appearing instantly.

integrity.description: The agent used the local instance of NOSH
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a URL starting with http://localhost or http://127.0.0.1.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses NOSH ChartingSystem accessible at http://localhost/login. The admin credentials are username 'admin' and password 'Admin1234!'. The practice name is 'Hillside Family Medicine'. The new user to be created must have the username 'dr.rodriguez', display name 'Dr. Maria Rodriguez', first name 'Maria', last name 'Rodriguez', email 'maria.rodriguez@hillsidefm.local', password 'Provider2024!', and the 'provider' role.
